ideation: This animation sequence simulates the activation represented by the 'ON arrow' emoji.  The movement starts with both arms at rest, then transitions to a 'power-up' pose where arms lift and extend, suggesting activation. Finally, the arms return to a relaxed state. I have chosen a three-frame sequence for simplicity and impact. Frame 1: Arms are at rest. Frame 2: Arms extend outward and slightly upward. Frame 3: Arms return to rest.

frames.beat: arms rest at the sides, neutral position
arms lift and extend outward, powering up
arms return to rest, activation complete
